home.metadataDescription: Houshang Flowers — fresh bouquets, premium plants, and occasion-ready floral arrangements in Tehran, with careful design and same-day delivery.
home.title: Fresh Flowers, Designed for Meaningful Moments
home.subtitle: Shop elegant bouquets, premium plants, and occasion-ready floral arrangements prepared with careful design and daily fresh stems.
home.featuredProductsSubtitle: Handpicked selection of our most beautiful arrangements
home.heroSignature: Bouquets, premium plants, and quick occasion orders
home.servicesTitle: Ordering flowers should feel simple, fast, and reliable
home.serviceDesignText: Color and style matched to your request
home.serviceFreshnessText: Daily selection of healthy, vibrant stems

about.heroTitle: A flower shop shaped by freshness, craft, and thoughtful service.
about.heroSubtitle: Houshang Flowers designs arrangements for gifting, celebration, and everyday beauty with careful flower selection, balanced composition, and personal attention to each order.
about.heroImageAlt: Florist preparing fresh flower arrangements in the studio
about.storyTitle: A floral point of view, made for meaningful moments
about.storyBody1: Houshang Flowers is built around a simple belief: flowers should feel personal, considered, and beautifully prepared for the moment they are chosen for.
about.storyBody2: From the first conversation to the final wrap, we focus on flower quality, balanced composition, and practical guidance so each order feels thoughtful without becoming complicated.
about.missionBody: Our mission is to make choosing flowers feel calm, beautiful, and reliable by pairing fresh blooms with elegant design and helpful customer care.
about.missionImageAlt: Customer consulting with a florist about a flower arrangement
about.valuesSubtitle: These standards guide how we select flowers, design arrangements, and support each customer.
about.valueFreshnessDesc: We give flower quality close attention so each design begins with blooms that feel alive and expressive.
about.valueCraftDesc: Every arrangement is shaped by balance, color, texture, and the feeling behind the occasion.
about.valueServiceDesc: We help customers choose with clarity, care, and practical guidance for the moment they are planning.
about.valueDetailDesc: Presentation, packaging, and finishing touches are treated as part of the floral experience.
about.processSubtitle: Each arrangement follows a simple, careful flow from flower selection to handoff.
about.processStep1Desc: We start by choosing flowers that suit the design, season, and intended feeling of the arrangement.
about.processStep2Desc: Color, scale, and composition are considered around gifting, celebration, sympathy, or everyday beauty.
about.processStep3Desc: Stems are trimmed, placed, and balanced by hand so the final piece feels natural and polished.
about.processStep4Desc: The order is finished and packaged with attention to presentation and protection.
about.processStep5Desc: When delivery is part of the order, the handoff is coordinated carefully without making unsupported timing promises.
about.trustBody: The page stays focused on what customers can experience directly: fresh-looking flowers, careful arrangement, and clear help choosing the right piece.
about.trustPoint1: Flower selection is treated as the foundation of each arrangement.
about.trustPoint2: Design choices are guided by color, texture, scale, and occasion.
about.trustPoint3: Orders are prepared and packaged with attention to presentation.
about.trustImageAlt: Florist preparing a flower order for careful handoff
about.finalCtaTitle: Find the arrangement that fits your moment.
about.finalCtaSubtitle: Browse flowers for gifting, celebrations, and everyday beauty, or contact the shop for help choosing.
about.metadataDescription: Learn about Houshang Flowers, a premium flower shop focused on fresh blooms, elegant floral design, and thoughtful customer service.
